title: Review Record
description: A human review decision on any generated candidate (see .agent/research/review-workflow.md).

candidateId.description: ID of the reviewed item (e.g. a knowledge-entry, lesson-candidate, prompt-candidate, agent-candidate, workflow-candidate, or radar-entry).

reviewer.description: The human reviewer's name/handle. Never a generic 'automated' value for critical content (see .agent/research/knowledge-ingestion.md).
